English: International Market Tutorial
Starts a quest to learn the basics of using the [DECEA3]International Market[-].
[DECEA3]International Market[-] Tutorial
Learn the basics of the International Market. Harvest [DECEA3]Zombie Ears[-], exchange them for a [DECEA3]Crypto Miner[-], and begin generating passive income.

Welcome to the International Market.

The old world may be gone, but commerce survived...and adapted.

Through the International Market, you can request thousands of different items by air drop, including food, medicine, building supplies, tools, and even vehicles.

This tutorial will teach you how to craft an [DECEA3]International Market Terminal[-] and use it to request your first [DECEA3]Crypto Miner[-]. You'll pay for it with [DECEA3]Zombie Ears[-], the first of many commodities accepted by the Market.

Once your Crypto Miner is running, you'll be ready to collect [DECEA3]Connection Cards[-] from participating nations. These unlock additional cryptocurrencies to mine, allowing you to purchase increasingly valuable items through the Market.
